name: Dry Chemical Extinguisher — Urea Based Powder, 4 kg
shortDescription: Potassium bicarbonate urea-complex powder for high-risk Class B and C firefighting.
longDescription: Urea-based (Monnex-type) potassium bicarbonate powder knocks down flammable-liquid and electrical fires faster than standard ABC powder, which is why it is specified for high-risk applications such as fuel handling, generator rooms and chemical process areas. The cylinder is epoxy-polyester coated internally and pure polyester coated externally for UV resistance, anti-corrosion treated through a seven-tank hot-dipping phosphate process, and helium leak-tested to the same 1×10⁻⁸ mbar·l/sec standard as the rest of the Kanex range.

images.alt: Dry Chemical Extinguisher — Urea Based Powder, 4 kg supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Also available in
specs.value: 2 kg, 6 kg, 9 kg — stored pressure or cartridge operated
